LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 8, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

ORDER ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE ARGUMENTS SET FORTH IN OPPOSITION DO NOT PROVIDE A BASIS TO DENY CONFIRMATION OF THE AWARD. A PETITION TO CORRECT OR VACATE THE AWARD MUST BE FILED WITHIN 100 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE AWARD. (CCP SEC. 1288; ABERS V. ROHRS (2013) 217 CAL.APP.4TH 1199, 1211.). ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason R. Lindsay, of Greenberg Traurig, LLP, Tel. 310.586.7700, for petitioners, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. The arguments set forth in opposition do not provide a basis to deny confirmation of the award. A petition to correct or vacate the award must be filed within 100 days after service of the award. (CCP sec. 1288; Abers v. Rohrs (2013) 217 Cal.App.4th 1199, 1211.). Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to June 8, 2015, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
